cml.item_physic.ui.physique.title: Physique
cml.item_physic.ui.physique.physics_tool: Fall progress from 0 to 1. Keyframe this on the film timeline: 0 = item up in the air, 1 = item landed at its final position with tumbling. BBS interpolates the fall automatically so it can be scrubbed.
cml.item_physic.ui.physique.drop_height_: Start height (in blocks) above the resting position when the fall progress is 0.
cml.item_physic.ui.physique.spins_toolti: Number of full tumbling rotations the item performs during the fall. It always lands flat at progress 1.
cml.item_physic.ui.physique.bounce_toolt: Bounce strength near landing. 0 = no bounce, 1 = strong bounce that fades out as the item settles.
cml.item_physic.ui.physique.overlap_tool: Allow dropped items to overlap and stack on top of each other. When disabled, items spread out so they do not overlap.
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.title: Rain
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.physics_tooltip: Fall/rain progress from 0 to 1. Keyframe this on the film timeline: 0 = items up in the air, 1 = all items landed. In rain mode items come down staggered but everything still finishes by 1.
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.count_tooltip: How many item instances to spawn.
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.mode_tooltip: Left-click to cycle forward, right-click to cycle back. Heap = items pile up in one spot; Rain = items scatter and fall staggered.
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.spread_tooltip: Scatter radius in blocks. Used fully by rain mode; heap mode uses a small fraction of it so items pile up.
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.drop_height_tool: Start height (in blocks) above the resting position when the progress is 0.
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.spins_tooltip: Number of full tumbling rotations each item performs during the fall.
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.bounce_tooltip: Bounce strength near landing. 0 = no bounce, 1 = strong bounce that fades out.
cml.item_physic.ui.rain.all_items_toolti: When enabled (or when the item pool below is empty), items are picked randomly from every item in the game.
